holdings.infoBox: DIG is an equity ETF with a total of 29 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares Ultra Energy (DIG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Energy Select Sector index. The fund provides 2x the daily performance of large US oil and gas companies. DIG was launched on Jan 30, 2007 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: ProShares and ProFunds Announce Benchmark Changes for 53 Geared Sector Funds
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares and ProFunds, premier providers of leveraged and inverse funds, announced plans to change the underlying indices for a combined 53 sector ETFs and mutual fu...

data.title: Top 3 Leveraged Energy ETFs for the Ukraine-Russia Crisis
data.text: Russia is the third largest oil producer in the world, making up 11% of global supply, according to data from the U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA). It is also a major natural gas supplier.

data.title: Energy ETFs Surge Amid Trade and Middle East News
data.text: A partial trade agreement and ongoing tensions in the Middle East may fuel oil stocks this week. Gain exposure to the sector using these three ETFs.
